name: Chance the Rapper
title: Rapper & Songwriter
bio: American rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer from Chicago. Known for the mixtapes 'Coloring Book' and 'Acid Rap.' Grammy Award winner.
faith: Chance has been vocal about his Christian faith, particularly on 'Coloring Book,' which is heavily influenced by gospel music. He has said, 'I believe in God. I believe that I've been really blessed by God.'

sources.title: Chance the Rapper talks faith, family at the Grammys
sources.note: Grammy acceptance speech thanking God and discussing faith

sources.title: Coloring Book (2016)
sources.note: Gospel-infused mixtape featuring tracks like "Blessings" and "How Great" with explicit Christian themes

tagline: Praised God on every album and proved faith is not a genre
